title: karpatiosorbus tauricola
intro: Karpatiosorbus tauricola, also known as the Tauric rowan, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the Balkan Peninsula. The medicinal properties of Karpatiosorbus tauricola include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular natural remedy for ailments such as digestive issues and fever, and it may also provide cardiovascular health benefits.
